captions.text: hell-ui grows as a compact component system for dense business apps.
Tests, docs, and package automation move alongside the public UI surface.

commits.message: feat: enhance UI components with new styles and utilities

feat(dialpad): enhance display structure with inner span for better styling feat(pdf-viewer): add print functionality and corresponding button feat(date-input): refactor to component with popover date picker and improved accessibility feat(dialog): introduce scoped overlay for interactive dialogs feat(menu): add submenu support and enhance menu item styling feat(time-input): implement scroll-column time picker with seconds option style(app-shell): improve secondary edge toggle visibility and interaction style(audio-player): adjust layout and introduce new utility classes for metadata style(date-picker): enhance date and time input styling for better UX style(dialog): add scoped overlay styles for interactive dialogs style(dialpad): refine layout and typography for improved usability style(menu): enhance menu item and section styling for better organization style(pdf-viewer): remove unused styles for cleaner code style(slider): improve track and range styling for better visual feedback style(tabs): adjust vertical tab styling for improved hover and active states style(tokens): update danger color palette for better accessibility
feat: update UI components with improved styles, new utilities, and enhanced functionality
